children.name: chromium
KAN-1/cart-management.spec.ts
Cart Management
TC003: Add and remove items from inventory updates cart badge and button
TC004: Remove an item from the cart page
TC005: Continue Shopping from cart preserves cart state
KAN-1/checkout-edge-cases.spec.ts
Edge Cases and Boundary Conditions
TC012: Empty cart shows no items and no cart badge @edge-cases
TC013: Price calculation accuracy with two products @edge-cases @AC3
TC014: Cart retains items when sorting is changed @edge-cases
TC019: Full end-to-end checkout with all 6 products @integration @smoke
KAN-1/checkout-happy-path.spec.ts
Happy Path Checkout Flow
TC001: Complete checkout with a single item @smoke @happy-path
TC002: Complete checkout with multiple items — verify price total @happy-path
KAN-1/checkout-navigation.spec.ts
Checkout Navigation and Cancel
TC009: Cancel from checkout info returns to cart with items preserved @navigation
TC010: Cancel from overview returns to inventory with items preserved @navigation
KAN-1/checkout-validation.spec.ts
Checkout Form Validation
TC006a: Submit empty form — first name required error @validation @negative
TC006b: Submit with only first name — last name required error @validation @negative
TC006c: Submit with first and last name — postal code required error @validation @negative
TC008: Error message can be dismissed @validation
KAN-2/login-edge-cases.spec.ts
Edge Cases & Security Tests — KAN-2
TC-KAN2-014: Special characters in username are handled gracefully
TC-KAN2-015: SQL injection attempt in username is handled gracefully
TC-KAN2-016: Very long username (500 chars) is handled gracefully
Edge case — special characters username is rejected without errors
Edge case — SQL injection username is rejected without errors
Edge case — very long string username is rejected without errors
KAN-2/login-happy-path.spec.ts
Happy Path Login Tests
TC-KAN2-001: Successful login with standard_user
TC-KAN2-002: Successful login with problem_user
TC-KAN2-003: Successful login with visual_user
KAN-2/login-negative.spec.ts
Invalid Credentials Tests
TC-KAN2-004: Login failure with invalid username
TC-KAN2-005: Login failure with test user
TC-KAN2-006: Login failure with both invalid credentials
TC-KAN2-010: Locked out user login attempt
KAN-2/login-validation.spec.ts
UI Validation Tests — KAN-2
TC-KAN2-007: Empty username shows "Username is required"
TC-KAN2-008: Empty password shows "Password is required"
TC-KAN2-009: Both fields empty — username is validated first
TC-KAN2-011: Error dismiss button clears the error banner
TC-KAN2-012: Helper text is visible on the login page
TC-KAN2-013: Input field attributes are correct

seed.spec.ts
Test group
seed
api
KAN-3/auth.spec.ts
AC1: Authentication
TC-KAN3-AUTH-001 — Login with valid credentials returns 200 and a JWT token
TC-KAN3-AUTH-002 — Login with invalid password [BUG-KAN3-001: accepts any password]
TC-KAN3-AUTH-003 — Login with missing username returns 400
TC-KAN3-AUTH-004 — Login with missing password returns 400
TC-KAN3-AUTH-005 — Authenticated GET returns 200 and array of strings
TC-KAN3-AUTH-006 — GET Authenticate/Get without token returns 401
KAN-3/components.spec.ts
AC3: Components Endpoints
TC-KAN3-COMP-001 — GET GetAllComponents returns 200 and array of components
TC-KAN3-COMP-001b — GET GetAllComponents without token [BUG-KAN3-002: expected 401]
TC-KAN3-COMP-002 — GET GetComponentByProductId returns 200 and components for product
TC-KAN3-COMP-003 — GET GetComponentsByProductId returns 200 and all components for product
TC-KAN3-COMP-004 — GET GetComponentByProductId for non-existent product returns 200 empty array
TC-KAN3-COMP-005 — POST CreateComponent with all fields returns 200 and created component
TC-KAN3-COMP-006 — POST CreateComponent with minimal body returns 200
TC-KAN3-COMP-007 — POST CreateComponent without token [BUG-KAN3-003: expected 401]
KAN-3/product.spec.ts
AC2: Product Endpoints
TC-KAN3-PROD-001 — GET GetProducts returns 200 and array of products
TC-KAN3-PROD-001b — GET GetProducts without token returns 401
TC-KAN3-PROD-002 — GET GetProductById with valid ID returns 200 and matching product
TC-KAN3-PROD-003 — GET GetProductById with non-existent ID returns 204 [BUG-KAN3-005: expected 404]
TC-KAN3-PROD-004 — GET GetProductByIdAndName with valid Id and Name returns 200
TC-KAN3-PROD-005 — GET GetProductByIdAndName without required Name returns 400
TC-KAN3-PROD-006 — GET GetProductByName returns 200 and matching product
TC-KAN3-PROD-007 — POST CreateProduct with all fields returns 200 and created product
TC-KAN3-PROD-008 — POST CreateProduct with mandatory fields only returns 200
TC-KAN3-PROD-009 — POST CreateProduct with out-of-range productType [BUG-KAN3-004: accepts 99]
